title: T-028 — API: planning_settings CRUD + status display + field visibility
prompt:
Implement planning_settings endpoint per PRD §14.1, §14.2, §14.4. GET /api/planning/settings returns the per-tenant settings row. PATCH /api/planning/settings updates allowed fields (everything except id, tenant_id, audit cols). Validation per V-PLAN-SET-001..004:
- po_approval_threshold ≥ 0
- intermediate_cascade_max_depth ∈ [1, 20]
- status_display covers all enum values for po/to/wo entities (V-PLAN-SET-003)
- d365_so_pull_cron is a valid cron expression (V-PLAN-SET-004)

status_display JSONB shape per §14.2 (label_pl, label_en, color, icon). field_visibility JSONB per §14.4 (per-role mask).

RED test asserts each V-PLAN-SET-XXX rule rejects bad input.

pipeline_inputs.description: Planning settings GET/PATCH endpoint with V-PLAN-SET-001..004 validation.
pipeline_inputs.details: Cron validation via 'cron-parser' library or equivalent (npm). status_display validator iterates known status enum sets per entity type. field_visibility allowed roles enumerated against 02-SETTINGS §10 role list. RBAC: only 'planning.settings.edit' role can PATCH.
acceptance_criteria: Given PATCH with intermediate_cascade_max_depth=25, when validated, then HTTP 400 with code 'V-PLAN-SET-002'.
Given PATCH with d365_so_pull_cron='not-a-cron', when validated, then HTTP 400 with code 'V-PLAN-SET-004'.
Given a valid PATCH body, when GET is called subsequently, then values reflect the update and updated_at is bumped.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/app/api/planning/settings/__tests__/route.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED tests for each V-PLAN-SET rule + RBAC + happy patch.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow non-admin to mutate settings.
Do not skip status_display coverage check — UI rendering depends on it.
